Quality Education.reason: Focus on statistical analysis and research skills aligns with Target 4.4 ('relevant skills for employment').

融合使用SPSS軟體的基本應用

Quality Education.reason: The course is a form of quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and provides students with relevant data analysis skills ('資訊處理能力') for employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced data analysis skills ('統計分析邏輯') which contribute to technological upgrading and innovation, supporting higher economic productivity (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research capabilities by teaching '數據及統計分析邏輯' and '網絡分析方法', which supports innovation and technological upgrading (Target 9.5).
evidence: 引導學生運用基礎傳播統計分析探討傳播領域研究主題的能力

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly supports statistical capacity-building (Target 17.19) by teaching students to '蒐集資料、分析、呈現' (collect, analyze, present) data, enhancing data literacy.
